divergences.decision: Per-criterion verdicts are binary — taxonomy promoted to report-back.md
divergences.refutedBy: Eric PR #414 Major finding (issue-comment + report-back.md:49 line comment): report-back.md's home .prism/skills/ ships to zero consumer installs; the taxonomy homed there is unreachable by shipped consumer pointers. Corrected mid-run via Sub-group F to a shipped reference.

charterCoverage.gap: final-child CI approximated by PR #414 check-runs (pre-merge, not yet main-CI)

actionItems.action: Decide whether the install-relative-link-gate / crossref-lint should flag inline-code-prose citations to non-shipping paths (the class that let the dangling `prism-413.md` plan-pointer slip past on Eric's first pass — caught only because it was inline-code prose, not a markdown link).

promotionCautions.decision: Per-criterion verdicts are binary; UNGRADEABLE carries a required reason — original verdict: taxonomy → promoted to report-back.md
promotionCautions.refutedBy: PR #414 execution record refuted the report-back.md promotion target: `.prism/skills/` ships to no consumer install (verified absent from npm `files` + `templates/install/`). Corrected home is `.prism/references/qa-test-plan/verdict-contract.md` (semantics), with report-back.md keeping only the `acVerdicts` shape + routing. Sub-group F made the correction live. Promote CORRECTED, not the original report-back.md target.
